---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you trying to do?**
Describe the build/search/parsing scenario you're trying to solve - not just
the specific UI control you have in mind. That context makes it much easier
to design something that fits the rest of the app.

**What would you like to see?**
Your proposed solution, if you have one in mind.

**Anything else?**
Alternatives you've considered, related items, screenshots/mockups, etc.
